Sync endpoint, scheduler, dashboard shell + Ultima sync indicator

human_actions_pending.action: Run match_talent_products, start the app (uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload), log in, click 'Sincronizar ahora', confirm 'Ultima sync' + toast update, inspect DB for correct Deal fields, confirm 6 funnel stage names match PIPE-05
human_actions_pending.context: .env already has real PIPEDRIVE_API_TOKEN/PIPEDRIVE_DOMAIN configured in the main checkout (no worktree needed)

decisions.decision: Tasks 1-3 each completed by a foreground worktree executor that hit an agent session-limit before returning cleanly; orchestrator verified and merged each task's commits directly to main (af9907e, then 5adbced+6862dd1) rather than discarding correct work.
decisions.rationale: Both cutoffs were time-based account limits (6pm then 12am America/Mexico_City), not code defects. All 14 tests pass and app boots after each merge.

decisions.decision: Copy .env into any fresh worktree before app-boot/live verification.
decisions.rationale: Fresh git worktrees don't include gitignored .env, causing pydantic Settings validation errors unrelated to the actual code.

next_action: Run Task 4's live-verify checkpoint (see .continue-here.md <remaining_work>) in the main checkout. On approval, write 02-01-SUMMARY.md, commit, update ROADMAP/STATE for plan 02-01 complete, then continue /gsd-execute-phase 02 for Wave 2 (02-02).
context_notes: Plan 02-01 is functionally complete and merged to main (6862dd1) - only the live human-verification checkpoint and SUMMARY.md remain. After that, Wave 2 (02-02, Resumen+Funnel) and Wave 3 (02-03, Por talento) remain, each ending in its own blocking checkpoint.
